items.title_zh: 资料来源：华为预计 2026 年 AI 芯片收入将达到约 120 亿美元，比 2025 年的 7.5 亿美元增长 60%，因为其 Ascend 950PR 芯片订单激增，而 Nvidia 在中国停滞不前（Zijing Wu/金融时报）

items.title: The persistent notion that AI disruption could create a permanent underclass signals how much collateral damage AI companies might tolerate in pursuit of AGI (Jasmine Sun/New York Times)

items.title_en: The persistent notion that AI disruption could create a permanent underclass signals how much collateral damage AI companies might tolerate in pursuit of AGI (Jasmine Sun/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 人们一直认为人工智能的颠覆可能会造成永久的下层阶级，这表明人工智能公司在追求通用人工智能的过程中可能会承受多大的附带损害（Jasmine Sun/纽约时报）

items.title_en: Hyundai unveils Pleos Connect, a next-generation infotainment system with Gleo AI voice assistant, debuting in May on the new Grandeur sedan in South Korea (Hyonhee Shin/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 现代汽车推出 Pleos Connect，这是一款配备 Gleo AI 语音助手的下一代信息娱乐系统，该系统于 5 月份在韩国的新款 Grandeur 轿车上首次亮相（Hyonhee Shin/彭博社）

items.title_en: Leaked audio: San Francisco and Austin first responders told the NHTSA that Waymo robotaxis are "backsliding" and committing more traffic violations than before (Aarian Marshall/Wired)
items.title_zh: 泄露的音频：旧金山和奥斯汀的急救人员告诉 NHTSA，Waymo 机器人出租车正在“倒退”，并且比以前犯下更多交通违规行为（Aarian Marshall/Wired）
items.title_bilingual: 泄露的音频：旧金山和奥斯汀的急救人员告诉 NHTSA，Waymo 机器人出租车正在“倒退”，并且比以前犯下更多交通违规行为（Aarian Marshall/Wired） / Leaked audio: San Francisco and Austin first responders told the NHTSA that Waymo robotaxis are "backsliding" and committing more traffic violations than before (Aarian Marshall/Wired)

items.title: OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 表示已签署了 10GW 的美国人工智能计算能力合同，过去 90 天内新增了 3GW 以上，实现了其曾经计划在 2029 年实现的目标（Dina Bass/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: OpenAI 表示已签署了 10GW 的美国人工智能计算能力合同，过去 90 天内新增了 3GW 以上，实现了其曾经计划在 2029 年实现的目标（Dina Bass/彭博社） / OpenAI says it has signed contracts for 10GW of US AI compute capacity, with 3GW+ added in the past 90 days, hitting a goal it once aimed to reach by 2029 (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
